mapper.sql: CASE WHEN IFNULL(contract_room_status.has_exiting, 0) = 1 THEN '3' WHEN IFNULL(contract_room_status.has_expiring30, 0) = 1 THEN '5' WHEN IFNULL(contract_room_status.has_expiring90, 0) = 1 THEN '4' WHEN IFNULL(contract_room_status.has_active, 0) = 1 THEN '7' WHEN IFNULL(contract_room_status.has_expired, 0) = 1 THEN '6' ELSE r.status END

LEFT JOIN ( SELECT room_id, MAX(CASE WHEN contract_status IN ('6', '7', '8') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_exiting, MAX(CASE WHEN contract_status = '2' OR (contract_status = '1' AND end_date < CURDATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_expired, MAX(CASE WHEN contract_status = '1' AND end_date >= CURDATE() AND end_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_expiring30, MAX(CASE WHEN contract_status = '1' AND end_date > DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND end_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_expiring90, MAX(CASE WHEN contract_status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_active FROM ( SELECT c.room_id, c.contract_status, c.end_date FROM biz_contract c WHERE c.del_flag = '0' AND c.room_id IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT CAST(REPLACE(TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(c.room_ids, ',', numbers.n), ',', -1)), 'room_', '') AS UNSIGNED), c.contract_status, c.end_date FROM biz_contract c INNER JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS n UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9 UNION ALL SELECT 10 ) numbers ON numbers.n <= 1 + LENGTH(COALESCE(c.room_ids, '')) - LENGTH(REPLACE(COALESCE(c.room_ids, ''), ',', '')) WHERE c.del_flag = '0' AND c.room_ids IS NOT NULL AND c.room_ids != '' ) contract_room WHERE room_id IS NOT NULL AND room_id > 0 GROUP BY room_id ) contract_room_status ON contract_room_status.room_id = r.id
mapper.select:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.direction, 'receivable') = 'receivable' AND COALESCE(p.pay_status, '0') != '1' AND p.pay_deadline <= CURDATE() THEN COALESCE(p.amount_due, 0) - COALESCE(p.amount_paid, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS dueReceivableAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.direction = 'payable' AND COALESCE(p.pay_status, '0') != '1' AND p.pay_deadline <= CURDATE() THEN COALESCE(p.amount_due, 0) - COALESCE(p.amount_paid, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS duePayableAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.direction, 'receivable') = 'receivable' AND COALESCE(p.pay_status, '0') != '1' AND p.pay_deadline > CURDATE() AND p.pay_deadline <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN COALESCE(p.amount_due, 0) - COALESCE(p.amount_paid, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS next30ReceivableAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.direction = 'payable' AND COALESCE(p.pay_status, '0') != '1' AND p.pay_deadline > CURDATE() AND p.pay_deadline <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN COALESCE(p.amount_due, 0) - COALESCE(p.amount_paid, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS next30PayableAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.direction, 'receivable') = 'receivable' AND COALESCE(p.pay_status, '0') != '1' AND p.pay_deadline < CURDATE() THEN COALESCE(p.amount_due, 0) - COALESCE(p.amount_paid, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS overdueTenantDebtAmount, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.direction, 'receivable') = 'receivable' AND COALESCE(p.pay_status, '0') != '1' AND p.pay_deadline <= CURDATE() THEN c.customer_name ELSE NULL END), 0) AS dueTenantCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.direction, 'receivable') = 'receivable' AND COALESCE(p.pay_status, '0') != '1' AND p.pay_deadline = CURDATE() THEN COALESCE(p.amount_due, 0) - COALESCE(p.amount_paid, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS todayOtherReceivableAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN p.direction = 'payable' AND COALESCE(p.pay_status, '0') != '1' AND p.pay_deadline = CURDATE() THEN COALESCE(p.amount_due, 0) - COALESCE(p.amount_paid, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS todayOtherPayableAmount FROM biz_contract_payment p LEFT JOIN biz_contract c ON c.contract_id = p.contract_id WHERE 1 = 1
AND p.park_id = #{parkId}

SELECT COUNT(1) AS totalCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN contract_status IN ('1', '5', '6', '7', '8') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS activeCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN contract_status = '4' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS terminatedCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN contract_status = '2' OR end_date < CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS expiredCount FROM biz_contract WHERE del_flag = '0'

SELECT COUNT(1) AS totalRooms, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN display_status = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS vacantRooms, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN display_status = '2' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS reservedRooms, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN display_status IN ('1', '3') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pendingRooms, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN display_status IN ('4', '5', '6') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS expiringRooms, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN display_status = '7' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS rentedRooms, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN display_status IN ('1', '3', '4', '5', '6', '7') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS occupiedRooms, COALESCE(AVG(CASE WHEN display_status IN ('1', '3', '4', '5', '6', '7') AND rent_price > 0 THEN rent_price END), 0) AS averageRent, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN display_status IN ('1', '3', '4', '5', '6', '7') THEN area ELSE 0 END), 0) AS rentedArea, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(area, 0)), 0) AS totalArea, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN display_status = '0' THEN area ELSE 0 END), 0) AS vacantArea, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN display_status IN ('1', '3', '4', '5', '6', '7') THEN area ELSE 0 END), 0) AS billableArea FROM ( SELECT r.id, r.area, r.rent_price, AS display_status FROM ics_room r
WHERE 1 = 1 AND r.park_id = #{parkId} ) room_status

SELECT buckets.label, COUNT(vacancy.vacant_days) AS value, buckets.sortNo FROM ( SELECT '0-30天' AS label, 0 AS min_days, 30 AS max_days, 1 AS sortNo UNION ALL SELECT '31-60天', 31, 60, 2 UNION ALL SELECT '61-90天', 61, 90, 3 UNION ALL SELECT '91-150天', 91, 150, 4 UNION ALL SELECT '151-210天', 151, 210, 5 UNION ALL SELECT '210天以上', 211, NULL, 6 ) buckets LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), DATE(r.vacant_since)) AS vacant_days FROM ics_room r
WHERE = '0' AND r.vacant_since IS NOT NULL AND r.park_id = #{parkId} ) vacancy ON vacancy.vacant_days >= buckets.min_days AND (buckets.max_days IS NULL OR vacancy.vacant_days <= buckets.max_days) GROUP BY buckets.label, buckets.sortNo ORDER BY buckets.sortNo ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL seq.n MONTH), '%Y-%m') AS month, COALESCE(ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN r.id IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM biz_contract c WHERE c.del_flag = '0' AND c.contract_status IN ('1', '2', '3', '6', '7', '8') AND c.start_date <= LAST_DAY(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL seq.n MONTH)) AND c.end_date >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL seq.n MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') AND (c.room_id = r.id OR FIND_IN_SET(r.id, REPLACE(COALESCE(c.room_ids, ''), 'room_', ''))) ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 / NULLIF(COUNT(r.id), 0), 2), 0) AS rentRate, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.id IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM biz_contract c WHERE c.del_flag = '0' AND c.contract_status IN ('1', '2', '3', '6', '7', '8') AND c.start_date >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL seq.n MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') AND c.start_date <= LAST_DAY(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL seq.n MONTH)) AND (c.room_id = r.id OR FIND_IN_SET(r.id, REPLACE(COALESCE(c.room_ids, ''), 'room_', ''))) ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS newRentCount FROM ( SELECT 5 AS n UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 0 ) seq LEFT JOIN ics_room r ON 1 = 1 AND r.park_id = #{parkId} GROUP BY seq.n ORDER BY seq.n DESC

SELECT opportunity_id AS id, COALESCE(enterprise_name, opportunity_no) AS name, COALESCE(follow_user, create_by, '-') AS followUser, COALESCE(next_follow_time, update_time, create_time) AS remindTime, opportunity_status AS status FROM biz_business_opportunity WHERE del_flag = '0' AND opportunity_status NOT IN ('DEAL', 'LOST') AND next_follow_time IS NOT NULL AND next_follow_time <= NOW()
ORDER BY next_follow_time ASC, opportunity_id DESC LIMIT 8
